sttrjv1.1

Object Oriented Programming — Assignment 1, Semester 2, 2025

SEARCH

Index

A C D E F G H I K L M P Q R S T V W X 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

addLine(String) - Method in class Section
Adds a given string to a section, wrapping it in a new Line class internally with sensible defaults, if a given String is too long, it will be truncated to fit.
addLine(Line) - Method in class Section
Add a given Line to this Section.
adjust(int) - Method in class Stat
Adjusts the current value of the Stat by the given amount.
adjustPosition(int, int) - Method in class Entity
Adjust the Entity's position (XyPair) by given amounts for x and y.
adjustX(int) - Method in class XyPair
Adjusts the current x value by the given amount.
adjustY(int) - Method in class XyPair
Adjusts the current y value by the given amount.
attack(Entity) - Method in class Klingon
Handles this Klingon attacking the given Entity.
attemptHeal(Enterprise) - Method in class Starbase
Handles checking if the given Enterprise is adjacent to the Starbase, and if it is, draining its spare energy reserves to give to the Enterprise.
attemptMoveBetweenQuadrants(XyPair) - Method in class Game
Will attempt to move using a given vector one quadrant and returns a boolean value indicating if it succeeded or failed.
attemptMoveInQuadrant(Quadrant, Entity, XyPair) - Method in class Game
Attempt to move an Entity in XyPair direction in this Quadrant.

C

cleanup() - Method in class Quadrant
Removes any Klingon and Starbase that have been marked for removal from their respective List.
commandList() - Method in class View
Render a screen giving a list of command options and summaries to the screen.
CourseValidator - Class in sttrj.input.validator
Overwrites Validator isValid to validate an input for course (direction).
CourseValidator() - Constructor for class CourseValidator
Constructs an instance of CourseValidator.

D

Dimensions - Class in sttrj.screen
Represents the concept of well, having 2d dimensions like width and height.
Dimensions(int, int) - Constructor for class Dimensions
Constructs an instance of Dimensions with the given width and height values.
drainEnergy(int) - Method in class Enterprise
Drains the given amount of energy from the Enterprise down to a minimum of 0.

E

energy() - Method in class Enterprise
Returns the current amount of energy in the Enterprise's energy Stat.
EnergyValidator - Class in sttrj.input.validator
Overwrites Validator isValid to validate an input for an energy value.
EnergyValidator(int) - Constructor for class EnergyValidator
Constructs a EnergyValidator with a given maximum acceptable energy value.
Enterprise - Class in sttrj.game
Representation of the Enterprise, handles internal state for the Enterprise in our game.
Enterprise() - Constructor for class Enterprise
Constructs an Enterprise instance with: shields at 500, energy at 2500, 10 torpedoes X:4, Y:4 for starting position The Enterprise can always detect itself.
Enterprise(int, int) - Constructor for class Enterprise
Constructs an Enterprise instance with: shields at 500, energy at 2500, 10 torpedoes X:x, Y:y for starting position The Enterprise can always detect itself.
Entity - Class in sttrj.game
Entity is used to represent a physical object or 'thing' in the Game.
Entity(int, int) - Constructor for class Entity
Construct a new Entity at the given coordinates.

F

fireTorpedo() - Method in class Enterprise
Creates a Torpedo using Entity and reduces the Enterprise internal ammo tracking by 1, returns null if no ammo left.

G

gainEnergy(int) - Method in class Enterprise
Adds the given amount of energy to the Enterprise up to it's maximum amount (3000).
Galaxy - Class in sttrj.game
Handles the Quadrants held within the Galaxy.
Galaxy() - Constructor for class Galaxy
Constructs a new Galaxy of 64 Quadrants.
Game - Class in sttrj.game
The main Game class responsible for holding all relevant classes for the game coordinating player and enemy actions.
Game(InputHandler, View, Enterprise, Galaxy) - Constructor for class Game
Construct an instance of Game with a generated list of 64 Quadrants and a current Quadrant chosen to act as the starting Quadrant.
generateQuadrants() - Method in class Galaxy
Generate 64 Quadrants, each with their own unique XyPair coordinates to set them in an 8*8 grid.
get() - Method in class Stat
Return the current value of this Stat.
get() - Method in class InputHandler
Prints out the current prompt and requests user input.
getContent() - Method in class Line
Return the text content for this line.
getCurrentQuadrant() - Method in class Game
Returns the current Quadrant the game is taking place in.
getDimensions() - Method in class Section
Returns the total Dimensions of a section.
getDirectionIndicatorArrow(int) - Method in class Game
Returns a single-arrow-character String representation of the direction of a course.
getEnterprise() - Method in class Game
Return the games Enterprise instance, useful in our View for accessing internal state of the Enterprise for display to the terminal.
getEntityAt(int, int) - Method in class Quadrant
Searches the Quadrant for any Entitys at the given location.
getGalaxy() - Method in class Game
Returns the Galaxy instance being used by this game.
getLine(int) - Method in class Section
Returns the string for a given line
getLines(int, int) - Method in class Section
Returns all lines between a starting and ending line inclusive of the start and end.
getMax() - Method in class Stat
Returns the maximum value of this Stat.
getQuadrantClusterAt(int, int) - Method in class Galaxy
Get a List of Quadrants adjacent to one with the given coordinates.
getRandomEmptySector() - Method in class Quadrant
Returns a random empty sector position as an XyPair.
getSymbolAt(int, int) - Method in class Quadrant
Returns the 3 character String symbol at the given x,y coordinates checking the Stars, Klingons, and Starbases for any of those at the given coordinates, if none are returns " ".
getVectorFrom(double) - Method in class Game
Returns an XyPair integer Cartesian representation of the given course (direction).
getX() - Method in class Entity
Returns the x coordinate value.
getX() - Method in class Quadrant
Returns the x-coordinate for this Quadrant.
getX() - Method in class XyPair
Returns the x value for this xy pair.
getY() - Method in class Entity
Returns the y coordinate value.
getY() - Method in class Quadrant
Returns the y-coordinate for this Quadrant.
getY() - Method in class XyPair
Returns the y value for this xy pair.

H

hasTorpedoAmmo() - Method in class Enterprise
Returns whether the Enterprise still has Torpedo Ammo to spend or not.
heal(int) - Method in class Enterprise
Heal the Enterprise for the given amount of energy.
height() - Method in class Dimensions
Returns the height of this Dimensions.
hit(int) - Method in class Enterprise
Hit the Enterprise for the given amount of damage.
hit(int) - Method in class Entity
Method for inflicting damage on the Entity.
hit(int) - Method in class Klingon
Hits this Klingon with an amount of damage.
hit(int) - Method in class Quadrant
Hit every Klingon in this Quadrant.

I

InputHandler - Class in sttrj.input
Responsible for handling user input, uses a given Validator to validate user input, and a given String for the user prompt to print.
InputHandler() - Constructor for class InputHandler
Constructs a InputHandler instance with a default generic Validator and a default prompt of "default prompt".
isActive() - Method in class Game
Returns if the game is still ongoing.
isAlive() - Method in class Enterprise
Return if the Enterprise is currently alive.
isMarkedForRemoval() - Method in class Entity
Returns whether an Entity has been marked as ready for removal or not.
isScanned() - Method in class Entity
Returns a boolean indicating if the Entity has been scanned.
isValid(String) - Method in class CourseValidator
Validates that the String input represents an integer at least 1 and less than 9.
isValid(String) - Method in class EnergyValidator
Takes the given String input and return if the given String input can be evaluated as an int equal to or less than the specified max energy.
isValid(String) - Method in class Validator
Returns if a given String input is valid, by default in the base Validator class it is always valid, intended to be overridden in more picky subclasses.
isValid(String) - Method in class WarpCoordValidator
Takes the given String input and return if the given String input can be evaluated as conforming to either a DIGIT,DIGIT or DIGIT,DIGIT.DIGIT pattern.

K

Klingon - Class in sttrj.game
Klingon handles Entity behaviour plus some extra behaviour.
Klingon(int, int) - Constructor for class Klingon
Constructs a Klingon instance at the given X and Y position.
klingonCount() - Method in class Galaxy
Returns how many Klingon total are in the Quadrants in this Galaxy.
klingonCount() - Method in class Quadrant
Returns the number of live Klingons in this Quadrant.
klingonsMarkedForRemovalCount() - Method in class Quadrant
Returns how many Klingons are currently marked for removal.

L

lastActionReport() - Method in class Game
Returns the currently stored string report for the outcome of the last action, used by our View class.
Line - Class in sttrj.screen
Represents a line of text.
Line(String, int) - Constructor for class Line
Constructs a Line with alignment of 'left' the text content set to the value given for the content parameter, and the width set to the width value given as a parameter.
Line(String, int, String) - Constructor for class Line
Constructs a Line with the text content set to the value given for the content parameter, the width set to the width value given as a parameter and the alignment set to the string value given.
longScan(Game) - Method in class View
Render a screen giving information on the result of the long scan action to the screen.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
 
Main - Class in sttrj
 
Main() - Constructor for class Main
 
move(int, double) - Method in class Game
Handles the movement action for the game.
move(Game) - Method in class View
Render a screen giving information on the result of the movement action to the screen.
moveBetweenQuadrants(int, double) - Method in class Game
Moves the Game to a new Quadrant using the given course and distance.
moveWithinQuadrant(Quadrant, Entity, int, int) - Method in class Game
Move the given Entity within the Quadrant, by the course and distance given or until another Entity or edge of the Quadrant would be hit.

P

parseWarpCoordsForCourse(String) - Method in class Game
Extract from the given coords the course.
parseWarpCoordsForDistance(String) - Method in class Game
Extracts the distance value from validated user input for warp coordinates.
phasers(int, Quadrant) - Method in class Game
Handles the Phaser action, takes in how much energy the user has spent to fire phasers.
phasers(Game) - Method in class View
Render a screen giving information on the result of the phaser action to the screen.

Q

Quadrant - Class in sttrj.game
Quadrant are sections of space with a randomised mixture of Stars, Klingons and Starbases.
Quadrant(int, int) - Constructor for class Quadrant
Constructs a Quadrant at the given coordinates.
Quadrant(int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class Quadrant
Overloaded constructor to instantiate a Quadrant with a given number of objects set.
quadrantAt(int, int) - Method in class Galaxy
Get a specific Quadrant using its x and y coordinate to find it.
quadrantTurn(Game) - Method in class View
Render out feedback of what happens in the Quadrant.

R

remove() - Method in class Entity
Marks an Entity as ready to be removed.
render() - Method in class Line
Returns a String representation of the line based on the set content, width and alignment properties set for this line.
render(Section...) - Method in class Renderer
Prints the given Section content to the screen.
Renderer - Class in sttrj.screen
Responsible for outputting Section and their Line to the screen.
Renderer(int, int) - Constructor for class Renderer
Constructs an instance of Renderer with the given width and height.
resetValidator() - Method in class InputHandler
Resets the InputHandler to its default Validator.

S

scan() - Method in class Entity
Marks this Entity as scanned, so it doesn't have to be scanned twice.
scan() - Method in class Quadrant
Scan every Klingon, Starbase and Star in this Quadrant.
Section - Class in sttrj.screen
A section represents a chunk of the screen with a set width and height.
Section(int, int) - Constructor for class Section
Constructs a Section instance with the given width and height.
set(int) - Method in class Stat
Sets the current value of the Stat to the given amount.
setMax(int) - Method in class Stat
Sets the maximum value to the given amount.
setPrompt(String) - Method in class InputHandler
Sets the input prompt to a new String value.
setSymbol(String) - Method in class Entity
Takes a given String as the new symbol we want to represent the Entity.
setValidator(Validator) - Method in class InputHandler
Sets the internal Validator used for the given prompts.
setX(int) - Method in class Entity
Sets the Entity's x coordinate to the new value.
setX(int) - Method in class XyPair
Sets the x value to the given value.
setY(int) - Method in class Entity
Sets the Entity's y coordinate to the new value.
setY(int) - Method in class XyPair
Sets the y value to the given value.
shields() - Method in class Enterprise
Returns the current amount of energy in the Enterprise's shields Stat.
shields(Game) - Method in class View
Render a screen giving information on the result of the shields action to the screen.
shortScan(Game) - Method in class View
Render a screen giving information on the result of the short scan action to the screen.
Star - Class in sttrj.game
Star is a relatively inert Entity in a Quadrant.
Star(int, int) - Constructor for class Star
Constructs a Star instance at the given coordinates.
Starbase - Class in sttrj.game
A Starbase is an Entity that can protect and heal the Enterprise.
Starbase(int, int) - Constructor for class Starbase
Constructs a Starbase instance at the given coordinates.
starbaseCount() - Method in class Quadrant
Returns the number of Starbase in this Quadrant.
starCount() - Method in class Quadrant
Returns the number of Star in this Quadrant.
Stat - Class in sttrj.game
A Statistic object - a managed integer with an enforced minimum and maximum value.
Stat(int, int) - Constructor for class Stat
Constructs a Stat instance.
sttrj - package sttrj
 
STTRJ - Search tag in Overview
Section
sttrj.game - package sttrj.game
 
sttrj.input - package sttrj.input
 
sttrj.input.validator - package sttrj.input.validator
 
sttrj.screen - package sttrj.screen
 
symbol() - Method in class Entity
Returns a 3-character String symbol for this Entity.
symbol() - Method in class Quadrant
Returns a String representation of the Quadrant formatted as DIGITDIGITDIGIT i.e.

T

tick() - Method in class Game
Progress the Game forward one 'tick', Handles Asking the user for input via the provided InputHandler, doing a turn of game actions and enemy actions.
tick(Game) - Method in class Quadrant
Handles a 'turn' of the game for the Starbases and Klingons in this Quadrant.
torpedoAmmo() - Method in class Enterprise
Returns an int representation of the number of torpedoes the Enterprise has to use.
torpedoes(int, Quadrant) - Method in class Game
Handles a torpedo being fired, if there are any left.
torpedoes(Game) - Method in class View
Render a screen giving information on the result of the torpedo action to the screen.
toString() - Method in class Entity
Returns a String representation of the current Entity.
toString() - Method in class Quadrant
Returns a descriptive String representation of this Quadrant's state.
toString() - Method in class Stat
Returns a String representation of the Stat.
toString() - Method in class XyPair
Returns a string representation of this XyPair.
transferEnergyToShields(int) - Method in class Enterprise
Adjust shields and energy by the given target amount of energy.

V

Validator - Class in sttrj.input.validator
Validator passed to InputHandler for use in validating the users input.
Validator() - Constructor for class Validator
Constructs a Validator instance.
View - Class in sttrj.screen
This class is responsible for handling printing stuff out to the screen.
View() - Constructor for class View
Constructs an instance of View

W

WarpCoordValidator - Class in sttrj.input.validator
Overwrites Validator isValid to validate an input for warp coordinates.
WarpCoordValidator() - Constructor for class WarpCoordValidator
Constructs a WarpCoordValidator instance.
width() - Method in class Dimensions
Returns the width of this Dimensions.

X

XyPair - Class in sttrj.game
Represents a data object with an x and y integer, used for things like position and vectors.
XyPair(int, int) - Constructor for class XyPair
Constructs an instance of XyPair with the given values.
